top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(l2.GPT) FROM Laboratory l2 WHERE l2.GPT IS NULL OR l2.GPT <= 40); -- assuming normal range upper limit is 40 U/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(l2.GPT) FROM Laboratory l2 WHERE l2.GPT IS NULL OR l2.GPT <= 40); -- assuming normal range upper limit is 40 U/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT > 40
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
      AND l2.GPT > 40
  );

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT > 40;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(l2.GPT) FROM Laboratory l2 WHERE l2.GPT IS NULL OR l2.GPT <= 40); -- assuming normal range upper limit is 40 U/L

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT > 40
  AND (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM Laboratory l2
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID
      AND l2.GPT > 40
  ) >= 1;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT > 40
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l2 
    WHERE l2.ID = p.ID 
      AND l2.GPT > 40
  );

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.SEX = 'M'
  AND l.GPT IS NOT NULL
  AND l.GPT > (SELECT MAX(l2.GPT) FROM Laboratory l2 WHERE l2.GPT IS NULL OR l2.GPT <= 40); -- assuming normal range upper limit is 40 U/L
